titleStmt.title: SII 11.24: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 24. (B.K. No. 104 of 1926-27). CHIÑCHLI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR A RUINED TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription is dated in Śaka 819, Piṅgaḷa (= A.D. 897) and belongs to the reign of Kannara Akālavarsha (i.e., Kṛishṇa II). It registers the erection of a (memorial) stone, probably recording the death of some person. The Fifty-six Mahājanas of Chiṁchila and a certain Kāḷabbe are mentioned. The versesQuoted heregiving the genealogy of the king are the same as those in the Nīlgund inscription of Amōghavarsha I (Ep. Ind. Vol. VI., p. 102).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayati bhuvanakāraṇaṁ svayaṁbhūrjjayati puraṁdaranandanōśurāriḥ jayatu girisuThe letter ti is engraved above the line.
tāniruddhadēhō durita bhayāpaharō harasya dēvaḥ . sa vAvyōdvēdhasāṁ dhA- mA yannāThe letter ta is engraved below the line.The letter ha is engraved below the letter yā in line 3.
bhikamalaṁ kṛtaṁ haraścayasya kalayā kamalaṁ kṛtaṁ . labdhapratiṣṭhamaThe verse is very corrupt.
cirāya kaliṁ sudūramutsaryya śuddhacaritairddharaṇītalasya kṛtvā punaḥ kṛ
tayugaśriyamapyaśēṣāṁ citraṁ kathaṁ nirupamaḥ kalivallabhōbhūt . prabhūta
variṣaḥ gōvintharāyaḥ śauryyāṁkavikramaḥ jitvā jagatsamastaṁ yajjagattuṅgaThe letter vi is shaped like dhi in the original.
Iti śrutaḥ . kēraḷamāḷavagauḍān sagūrjjarān citrakūṭagiridurggasthān badvā kāṁcīśamatha sa
kīrttinārāyaṇō jātaḥ . Arinṛpatamakuṭaghaṭṭitacaraṇavanditaśauryyaḥ vaṁ
gāṅgamagadhamāḷavavēṁgīśādyarccitōtiśayadhavaḷaḥ © tatsutō . kannaranakālavari
ṣapravarddhamāna rājyābhivṛddhi saluttire sakanṛpakālātītasaṁvatsara śataṅgaḷeṇṭu
nūṟapattoṁbhattaneya piṅgaḷaneṁba varṣaṁ pravarttise tadvariṣābhyāntaradoḷ śrī
ciṁcilada Ayvattaṟuvaruṁ mahājanaṁ neradiralu
vurudaṇṇḍalgolleyara magaḷ kāḷabbe
yde bīḷisi kallaṁ niṟisidōr Idaṁ kādōrgge sāsira kavileyuṁ sūryyagrahā
ṇadoḷ kurukṣētradoḷ koṭṭa phalama kkidaṁ
yumaṁ vāraṇāsiyuma naḻida pāpaṁ
yvudu Idaṁ Āruṁ kāvōm © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ
ṣaṣṭhi variṣa(ṁ)sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . © © koḻpōkara giri yyēna likhitaṁ
Digital edition of SII 11.24 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
